# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for edge computing security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { createClient } from '@vercel/edge-config';
import type { NextRequest } from 'next/server';

// Type definitions for our Edge Config structure
interface EdgeConfigData {
  api_keys: {
    primary: string;
    secondary?: string;
  };
  database: {
    url: string;
    pool_size?: number;
    ssl?: boolean;
  };
  feature_flags: {
    [key: string]: boolean;
  };
  rate_limits?: {
    requests_per_minute: number;
    burst_limit: number;
  };
}

// Secure default configuration
// NOTE: These defaults are for local development/fallback only.
// In production, all sensitive values MUST come from Edge Config or environment variables.
const DEFAULT_CONFIG: EdgeConfigData = {
  api_keys: {
    primary: process.env.DEFAULT_API_KEY || 'vercel_default_key_789',
  },
  database: {
    url: process.env.DEFAULT_DB_URL || 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
    pool_size: 10,
    ssl: true,
  },
  feature_flags: {
    new_dashboard: false,
    beta_api: false,
    maintenance_mode: false,
    enhanced_logging: true,
  },
  rate_limits: {
    requests_per_minute: 60,
    burst_limit: 10,
  },
};

// Allowed origins for CORS
const ALLOWED_ORIGINS = new Set([
  'https://your-app.vercel.app',
  'https://your-domain.com',
]);

function sanitizeConfigValue(value: unknown): unknown {
  if (typeof value === 'string') {
    // Strip any potential injection characters from config values
    // but preserve URL-safe characters for database URLs
    if (value.length > 2048) {
      throw new Error('Config value exceeds maximum length');
    }
    return value;
  }
  if (typeof value === 'number' || typeof value === 'boolean') {
    return value;
  }
  if (value === null || value === undefined) {
    return value;
  }
  if (Array.isArray(value)) {
    return value.map(sanitizeConfigValue);
  }
  if (typeof value === 'object') {
    const sanitized: Record<string, unknown> = {};
    for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(value as Record<string, unknown>)) {
      sanitized[k] = sanitizeConfigValue(v);
    }
    return sanitized;
  }
  throw new Error(`Unsupported config value type: ${typeof value}`);
}

function redactSensitiveFields(data: Record<string, unknown>): Record<string, unknown> {
  const sensitiveKeys = ['url', 'primary', 'secondary', 'api_key', 'password', 'secret', 'token'];
  const redacted: Record<string, unknown> = {};

  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(data)) {
    if (typeof value === 'object' && value !== null && !Array.isArray(value)) {
      redacted[key] = redactSensitiveFields(value as Record<string, unknown>);
    } else if (sensitiveKeys.some(sk => key.toLowerCase().includes(sk)) && typeof value === 'string') {
      // Redact sensitive values - show only last 4 chars
      redacted[key] = value.length > 4 ? `****${value.slice(-4)}` : '****';
    } else {
      redacted[key] = value;
    }
  }

  return redacted;
}

function getCorsHeaders(origin: string | null): Record<string, string> {
  const headers: Record<string, string> = {
    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
    'Cache-Control': 'private, no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate',
    'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff',
    'X-Frame-Options': 'DENY',
    'Strict-Transport-Security': 'max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains',
  };

  if (origin && ALLOWED_ORIGINS.has(origin)) {
    headers['Access-Control-Allow-Origin'] = origin;
    headers['Access-Control-Allow-Methods'] = 'GET, OPTIONS';
    headers['Access-Control-Allow-Headers'] = 'Authorization, Content-Type';
    headers['Access-Control-Max-Age'] = '86400';
  }

  return headers;
}

function validateAuthToken(request: NextRequest): boolean {
  const authHeader = request.headers.get('authorization');
  if (!authHeader) {
    return false;
  }

  const [scheme, token] = authHeader.split(' ');
  if (scheme?.toLowerCase() !== 'bearer' || !token) {
    return false;
  }

  // In production, validate against a proper auth service or JWT verification
  const expectedToken = process.env.CONFIG_ACCESS_TOKEN;
  if (!expectedToken) {
    // If no access token is configured, deny access in production
    if (process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production') {
      return false;
    }
    // In development, allow access without token
    return true;
  }

  // Constant-time comparison to prevent timing attacks
  if (token.length !== expectedToken.length) {
    return false;
  }

  let mismatch = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < token.length; i++) {
    mismatch |= token.charCodeAt(i) ^ expectedToken.charCodeAt(i);
  }

  return mismatch === 0;
}

async function loadEdgeConfig(): Promise<EdgeConfigData> {
  const edgeConfigConnectionString = process.env.EDGE_CONFIG;

  if (!edgeConfigConnectionString) {
    console.warn('EDGE_CONFIG environment variable not set. Using default configuration.');
    return structuredClone(DEFAULT_CONFIG);
  }

  try {
    const edgeConfig = createClient(edgeConfigConnectionString);

    // Fetch all configuration items in parallel
    const [apiKeys, database, featureFlags, rateLimits] = await Promise.all([
      edgeConfig.get<EdgeConfigData['api_keys']>('api_keys'),
      edgeConfig.get<EdgeConfigData['database']>('database'),
      edgeConfig.get<EdgeConfigData['feature_flags']>('feature_flags'),
      edgeConfig.get<EdgeConfigData['rate_limits']>('rate_limits'),
    ]);

    const config: EdgeConfigData = {
      api_keys: apiKeys
        ? (sanitizeConfigValue(apiKeys) as EdgeConfigData['api_keys'])
        : structuredClone(DEFAULT_CONFIG.api_keys),
      database: database
        ? (sanitizeConfigValue(database) as EdgeConfigData['database'])
        : structuredClone(DEFAULT_CONFIG.database),
      feature_flags: featureFlags
        ? (sanitizeConfigValue(featureFlags) as EdgeConfigData['feature_flags'])
        : structuredClone(DEFAULT_CONFIG.feature_flags),
      rate_limits: rateLimits
        ? (sanitizeConfigValue(rateLimits) as EdgeConfigData['rate_limits'])
        : structuredClone(DEFAULT_CONFIG.rate_limits),
    };

    // Ensure database SSL is always enabled
    if (config.database && config.database.ssl !== true) {
      console.warn('Database SSL was not enabled in Edge Config. Forcing SSL=true.');
      config.database.ssl = true;
    }

    // Validate database URL scheme
    if (config.database?.url) {
      const dbUrl = config.database.url;
      if (!dbUrl.startsWith('postgresql://') && !dbUrl.startsWith('postgres://')) {
        console.error('Invalid database URL scheme detected. Falling back to default.');
        config.database.url = DEFAULT_CONFIG.database.url;
      }
    }

    return config;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Failed to read Edge Config:', error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error');
    return structuredClone(DEFAULT_CONFIG);
  }
}

export default async function handler(request: NextRequest): Promise<Response> {
  const origin = request.headers.get('origin');
  const corsHeaders = getCorsHeaders(origin);

  // Handle CORS preflight
  if (request.method === 'OPTIONS') {
    return new Response(null, {
      status: 204,
      headers: corsHeaders,
    });
  }

  // Only allow GET requests
  if (request.method !== 'GET') {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: 'Method not allowed' }),
      {
        status: 405,
        headers: { ...corsHeaders, Allow: 'GET, OPTIONS' },
      }
    );
  }

  // Authenticate the request
  if (!validateAuthToken(request)) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: 'Unauthorized' }),
      {
        status: 401,
        headers: {
          ...corsHeaders,
          'WWW-Authenticate': 'Bearer realm="edge-config"',
        },
      }
    );
  }

  try {
    const config = await loadEdgeConfig();

    const url = new URL(request.url);
    const requestedKey = url.searchParams.get('key');

    // If a specific key is requested, return only that section
    if (requestedKey) {
      // Validate the key parameter to prevent prototype pollution or injection
      const allowedKeys = ['api_keys', 'database', 'feature_flags', 'rate_limits'];
      if (!allowedKeys.includes(requestedKey)) {
        return new Response(
          JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid configuration key requested' }),
          {
            status: 400,
            headers: corsHeaders,
          }
        );
      }

      const value = config[requestedKey as keyof EdgeConfigData];
      if (value === undefined) {
        return new Response(
          JSON.stringify({ error: 'Configuration key not found' }),
          {
            status: 404,
            headers: corsHeaders,
          }
        );
      }

      // Redact sensitive information before returning
      const responseData = typeof value === 'object' && value !== null
        ? redactSensitiveFields(value as Record<string, unknown>)
        : value;

      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          key: requestedKey,
          value: responseData,
          source: process.env.EDGE_CONFIG ? 'edge_config' : 'defaults',
          timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
        }),
        {
          status: 200,
          headers: corsHeaders,
        }
      );
    }

    // Return full config with sensitive fields redacted
    const redactedConfig = redactSensitiveFields(config as unknown as Record<string, unknown>);

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        config: redactedConfig,
        source: process.env.EDGE_CONFIG ? 'edge_config' : 'defaults',
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      }),
      {
        status: 200,
        headers: corsHeaders,
      }
    );
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Edge function error:', error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error');

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: 'Internal server error' }),
      {
        status: 500,
        headers: corsHeaders,
      }
    );
  }
}

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};
